title: Amtech - Claw Hammer, Fully Polished Steel Head, Traditional Wooden Handle, Balanced Weight for Smooth Striking, Perfect for Carpentry and Woodwork (16oz / 450g)
availability_text: Only 13 left in stock (more on the way).
features: 16oz (450g) POLISHED HEAD: Combines balance and striking power for smooth, effective hammering.
HEAVY-DUTY STEEL SHAFT: Built to last, resisting bending or breaking even under tough use.
COMFORTABLE ANTI-SLIP HANDLE: Offers secure grip and reduces vibration for improved user comfort.
VERSATILE CLAW FUNCTION: Curved claw easily extracts nails and tackles prying tasks, enhancing versatility.
SUITABLE FOR MULTIPLE APPLICATIONS: Ideal for woodworking, framing, and general household or site use.
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning Yes Box Contains 1x Hammer See more
